title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Sep 22 2023Ready Set Film! Award Ceremony and Screening Held for One in 24 Hour Film Race NYU Shanghai’s sixth annual "One in 24" film race culminated in an award ceremony and film screening.Student
May 28 2023NYU Shanghai Celebrates 2023 Graduate ConvocationNYU Shanghai held its fourth Graduate Convocation on May 28.Commencement
May 22 2023NYU Shanghai Celebrates the Class of 2023’s GraduationCongratulations, Class of 2023!Commencement
May 12 2023One Step at a Time: Exhibition Explores Slow StorytellingA new exhibition at the ICA at NYU Shanghai, in collaboration with the Out of Eden Walk global storytelling projectInstitute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Apr 28 2023Communicating Science: NYU Shanghai’s First Postdoctoral and Doctoral Research AssemblyNYU Shanghai hosted the first event dedicated to showcasing postdoctoral and PhD research work.Research10th Anniversary
Apr 27 2023TEDxNYUShanghai: Self-Discovery and Resilience in A State of “Flux”Seven speakers tell stories on the theme of "Flux" for this year's TEDxNYUShanghai conference. Student
Apr 27 2023NYU Shanghai Launches the Mini Course Platform: Liberal Arts Education at Your FingertipsOn April 22nd, NYU Shanghai officially unveiled its “Mini Course” (上纽课) online learning platform.Community10th Anniversary
Apr 21 2023Postdoctoral Carnival and Job Fair Attract NYU Shanghai StudentsThe event saw an afternoon of activities ranged from a lecture, on district policies, a panel and a job fair Community
Mar 16 2023ChatGPT: How Smart is it Really?NYU Shanghai hosted an open talk on ChatGPT and Large Language Model.Research
Mar 16 2023Pioneer, Exploration, Innovation, Development - HR Management in International EducationOn March 10 to 11, NYU Shanghai’s HR Department hosted a forum on "HR Management Forum in International Education" Conference & Symposium
Mar 10 2023Collaborate, Compete, Consult: NYU Shanghai’s First Consulting Case CompetitionA hundred and thirty-two participants from fourteen majors conducted research on the fresh ground coffee market.CommunityStudent
Mar 7 2023Connection through Music – “The Friendship of Two Cities: Shanghai–New York”The community celebrated the 10th Anniversary on March 3 with an opening concert featuring award-winning musicians.10th AnniversaryExternal
Mar 6 2023Returning Home: NYU Shanghai Makes History with First Alumni Reunion NYU Shanghai's first Alumni Reunion welcomed 223 undergraduate and graduate alumni to the New Bund Campus. 10th Anniversary
Mar 3 2023NYU Shanghai 10th Anniversary Celebrations at New Bund CampusNYU Shanghai’s 10th anniversary events got underway on Friday, March 3, with a ceremony held on the new campus.Community10th Anniversary
Dec 15 2022Creating A Digital Memory Map of Century Avenue CampusThe IllumiLand virtual campus project creates a virtual space for community members to leave their memories.Community10th Anniversary
